ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue Or Dismiss This Action
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Specially Appearing Defendant Yolanda Estes' motion to change venue is granted. No opposition filed. The case will be transferred to Contra Costa County. All costs of transfer will be paid by plaintiff Jennifer Toy. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk
